Scholar
40 posts
Recipies that use Lucidem are (this is from EQ Traders).


Distillate of Celestial Healing XI
MAGIC ITEM
Charges: 1
Effect: Elixir of Healing XI (Casting Time: Instant)
Required level of 70
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
This item is not used in any recipes. Components: Gerti Blossom, Lucidem, Small Vial(5), Sour Clover
In: Reinforced Medicine Bag, Foldable Reinforced Medicine Bag
Yield: 5
On Failure Returns: Small Vial(5)
This combine may only be made by Shaman 388

Distillate of Clarity XI
MAGIC ITEM
Charges: 1
Effect: Elixir of Clarity XI (Casting Time: 1.5)
Required level of 70
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
This item is not used in any recipes. Components: Katuka Bark, Lucidem, Small Vial(5), Sour Clover
In: Reinforced Medicine Bag, Foldable Reinforced Medicine Bag
Yield: 5
On Failure Returns: Small Vial(5)
This combine may only be made by Shaman 388

Distillate of Divine Healing XI
MAGIC ITEM
Charges: 1
Effect: Unknown Spell (Casting Time: Instant)
Required level of 70
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
This item is not used in any recipes. Components: Lucidem, Small Vial(5), Sour Clover, Tregrum
In: Reinforced Medicine Bag, Foldable Reinforced Medicine Bag
Yield: 5
On Failure Returns: Small Vial(5)
This combine may only be made by Shaman 388

Distillate of Health XI

Race: ALL
This item is not used in any recipes. Components: Cententialspore, Lucidem, Small Vial(5), Sour Clover

Yield: 5

This combine may only be made by Shaman 388
